hypothesis: A conditional variational autoencoder trained on Li–Si–X crystals and conditioned on Si/Li presence, target capacity >1500 mAh/g, and large channel radius will generate novel silicon-based anode structures that, after CHGNet relaxation, retain >1500 mAh/g capacity, preserve large continuous Li+ migration channels between charged and discharged states (Rt nearly constant), and exhibit energetic stability (mean energy per atom variation <4%).
